ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of experiment */,
  "study_area" TEXT /* Study area or field of research */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("experiment_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this result belongs to */,
  "yes_answer" INTEGER /* Binary response (0 or 1) indicating yes/no answer */,
  "time" REAL /* Time measurement recorded during the experiment */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance measurement recorded during the experiment */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity measurement recorded during the experiment */,
  "difference" REAL /* Difference between expected and observed values */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the researcher is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., time, distance, intensity) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of experiment */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this file is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role for which the permissions apply */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the role can view data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the role can edit data */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the role can delete data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this statistic belongs to */,
  "mean" REAL /* Mean value of the measurements */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance of the measurements */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the collaboration (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this model is associated with */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used to train the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_learning_models_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)
